tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"fortigate-firewall","command":"config firewall policy
    edit 100
        set service "ALL"
        set utm-status enable
        set ips-sensor "default"
    next
end"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
config firewall policy

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) #     edit 100

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (100) #         set service "ALL"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (100) #         set utm-status enable

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (100) #         set ips-sensor "default"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (100) #     next
This policy has the following warnings:
The non-inspection profile doesn't perform SSL inspection.
FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) # end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
show firewall policy
config firewall policy
    edit 100
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-NAT"
        set uuid 868edb74-2aaa-51f1-7993-02c265357be3
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set utm-status enable
        set ips-sensor "default"
        set nat enable
        set comments "DNS tunneling mitigation: block direct DNS to WAN requires DNS filter profile unavailable in this build"
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #
